species: normal human intestinal epithelial cell lines (HIEC-6 and NCM460) and CRC cell lines (HCT8, HCT116 and DLD1)
tissue: normal human intestinal epithelial cell lines (HIEC-6 and NCM460)
cell_type: normal human intestinal epithelial cell lines (HIEC-6 and NCM460)
disease_state: the development and progression of colorectal carcinoma (CRC)
sample_source: paired CRC samples and normal adjacent tissues
Eighty-five paired CRC samples and normal adjacent tissues were used to analyze circPLCE1 RNA levels.
anatomic_site_tumor: injected HCT8 cells transfected with the previously mentioned plasmids to observe the tumor growth and liver metastasis.
cell_line: HCT8 and DLD1 CRC cell lines were selected to conduct cell experiments
